name: Floyd-Warshall Algorithm
description: Given an adjacency matrix of a weighted directed graph, find the shortest distances between every pair of vertices. If no path exists, the distance remains as infinity (-1).
constraints: 1 <= V <= 500. -1000 <= matrix[i][j] <= 1000. matrix[i][i] = 0. -1 means no edge.
